queries.question: For every game what platforms can they each be played on?
queries.sql: select games.title , platforms.name from Games_Platforms join Platforms on Games_Platforms.platformsID = Platforms.platformID join Games on Games_Platforms.gamesID = Games.gameID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?games_platforms a :Games_Platforms .
  ?platforms a :Platforms .
  ?games_platforms p:hasPlatforms ?platforms .
  ?games a :Games .
  ?games_platforms p:hasGames ?games .
  ?games p:title ?title .
  ?platforms p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: What platform is used by all games at the same time?
queries.sql: SELECT Platforms.name  from Games_Platforms join Platforms on Games_Platforms.platformsID = Platforms.platformID join Games on Games_Platforms.gamesID = Games.gameID   GROUP BY Games_Platforms.platformsID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Games_Platforms.gamesID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Games)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What game platforms are there for all the games listed?
